subject: [PATCH v2] mm/vmpressure: skip socket pressure for costly order reclaim

reviews.author: Shakeel Butt
reviews.summary: Approved the patch with minor adjustments to the commit message. Acknowledged that the patch aligns with their long-term plan to move networking stack away from vmpressure.

reviews.author: Rik van Riel
reviews.summary: Expressed enthusiasm for the patch's potential to improve network performance by avoiding unnecessary memory pressure signals. Requested a Reviewed-by tag.

2026-04-03.patch_summary: Patch aims to skip socket pressure for costly order reclaim, specifically THPs, to avoid unnecessary memory pressure signals.
